/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libfacedetection.so -o libfacedetection.so CMakeFiles/facedetection.dir/src/facedetectcnn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/facedetection.dir/src/facedetectcnn-model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/facedetection.dir/src/facedetectcnn-data.cpp.o  /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
